body:
that crept up after a couple of refactor of `active_cells_map`. I have added also a small test for IBG construction on a cubed sphere that we can expand upon.

closes #4573 

with @siddharthabishnu

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fix a couple of bugs for immersed cubed sphere

body:
Fixes issue #4435 where `zspacing()` was not properly adjusting for PartialCellBottom immersed boundaries. Added missing Δz method definitions for all face/center combinations for vertically-static partial cell bottom immersed boundary grids.

This PR will also add more tests for all flavors of `ImmersedGrid`s.

Closes #4435

cc @glwagner @simone-silvestri
title: (0.96.32) Fix `zspacing()` for `PartialCellBottom` immersed boundaries and add tests for `ImmersedGrid`s
